chips.text: no acute symptoms reported if applicable
signs of hormone excess documented if assessed
hormonal workup plan documented if clinician decided

speed_preset.text: no acute symptoms reported if applicable

history_draft.text: Patient presents with adrenal incidentaloma. [Imaging finding]. [Symptoms]. [Blood pressure]. [Weight change]. [Bruising/striae]. [Weakness/fatigue]. [Electrolytes].

exam_prompts.text: Documented if assessed or measured. Blood pressure documented.
Documented if assessed or measured. Weight documented.
Documented if assessed or measured. General appearance documented.

investigation_options.text: Reviewed if relevant. Reviewed. Clinician-entered CT/MRI report reviewed.
Reviewed if relevant. Reviewed. Clinician-entered Hormonal workup reviewed.
Reviewed if relevant. Reviewed. Clinician-entered Electrolytes reviewed.

clinical_blockers: The workflow does not encode all lesion, imaging, biochemical, age, pregnancy, frailty, or malignancy-risk qualifiers.

No-acute-symptom wording, general appearance, weight, weight change, bruising or striae, weakness or fatigue, family history, medicine history, previous records, generic clinician plan, fixed follow-up intervals, PRN wording, and the combined history draft remain unsupported.
Diagnosis, hormone-result interpretation, imaging classification, surgery, treatment, medicine selection, urgency, and exact follow-up timing remain clinician responsibilities.
